name: National Democratic Alliance
text: NDA is the ruling coalition led by BJP. Key allies: JD(U), TDP, Shiv Sena (Shinde), LJP(RV), AJSU, JD(S), Naga People's Front. Won 293 seats in 2024 Lok Sabha. Formed government at the centre in 1998, 1999, 2014, 2019, and 2024.

name: INDIA Alliance
text: Indian National Developmental Inclusive Alliance (INDIA) is the opposition coalition formed in 2023. Key members: Congress, SP, TMC, DMK, AAP, JMM, RJD, CPI(M), NCP-SP, Sena-UBT, IUML. Won 234 seats in 2024 Lok Sabha. Rahul Gandhi is the Leader of Opposition.

name: United Progressive Alliance
text: UPA was the Congress-led coalition that ruled India from 2004 to 2014 under PM Manmohan Singh. Key allies included DMK, NCP, TMC (initially). Largely succeeded by the INDIA alliance in 2024.

name: Left Front
text: Left Front is a coalition of communist and left-wing parties led by CPI(M). Ruled West Bengal for 34 years (1977-2011). Currently governs Kerala. Key members: CPI(M), CPI, RSP, Forward Bloc.

name: Maha Vikas Aghadi
text: MVA is the opposition alliance in Maharashtra comprising Shiv Sena (UBT), NCP (Sharad Pawar), and Congress. Governed Maharashtra from 2019-2022 under CM Uddhav Thackeray. Won majority of Maharashtra's Lok Sabha seats in 2024.

name: Mahayuti
text: Mahayuti is the ruling alliance in Maharashtra comprising BJP, Shiv Sena (Shinde), and NCP (Ajit Pawar). Won the 2024 Maharashtra Assembly elections with a massive mandate.
